name: Impossible Cherry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a pie plate, 10 x 1 1/2 inches.
3. Beat all ingredients except the cherry filling and streusel together until smooth. Blend for 15 seconds or whisk for 1 minute.
4. Pour the mixture into the greased pie plate.
5. Spoon the cherry pie filling evenly over the top.
6. Bake for 25 minutes.
7. Top with the streusel topping.
8. Bake until the streusel is brown, about 10 more minutes.
9. Allow to cool; refrigerate any remaining pie.
